channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: OpenAI hires OpenClaw AI agent developer Peter Steinberg
item.description: âUltimately, I felt OpenAI was the best place to continue pushing on my vision and expand its reach.â

item.title: Warner Bros. weighs reopening sale negotiations with Paramount
item.description: Paramount submitted amended terms last week that addressed several concerns.

item.title: Partial government shutdown drags on as DHS funding talks stall
item.description: Department of Homeland Security shutdown persists as Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., demands ICE reforms following fatal Minnesota shoot...

item.title: Blackstone mogul warned of âurgent needâ for AI preparednessâNow heâs turning his $48 billion fortune into a top philanthropic foundation
item.description: Stephen Schwarzman is committing his wealth to his foundation, which could become one of the largest in the world.

item.title: Cisco CEO says all people who are wildly successful in tech share 3 traits
item.description: Technical chops matterâbut Chuck Robbins says EQ and commitment to the team are what really separate top performers in the AI era.

item.title: Rampant AI demand for memory is fueling a growing chip crisis
item.description: The cost of one type of DRAM soared 75% from December to January, accelerating price hikes throughout the holiday quarter.

item.title: The Reform That Would Mark the Beginning of the End for the Department of Education
item.description: Moving the student loan portfolio to the Treasury Department would benefit both borrowers and taxpayers.

item.title: Cornyn opponent Paxton says Washington Republicans wasting time, money trying to rescue incumbent
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton says Washington Republicans are wasting their time and resources trying to throw Sen. John Cornyn a lifeline in the ...

item.title: The one sentence in Rubio's Munich speech that revealed Trump's red line for Europe
item.description: At Munich Security Conference, Rubio articulates Trump's break with global status quo, pressing European allies to shoulder more defense responsibilit...

item.title: Teen daughter of a Chicago man detained in an immigration case dies from a rare cancer
item.description: A Chicago teen who spoke out for her father's release after he was detained last fall by immigration officials in a deportation case has died after ba...

item.title: The Apolitical Library Is Just Fiction
item.description: Weâve strayed from the ideal of libraries as community temples of learning.

item.title: Hillary Clinton clashes with Czech leader over Trump policies at Munich security conference
item.description: Former secretary of state Hillary Clinton clashed with Czech deputy prime minister who defended the Trump administration at Munich Security Conference

item.title: Department of War transports next-generation reactor in nuclear energy milestone
item.description: Department of War airlifts nuclear reactor via C-17 aircraft from California to Utah, advancing Trump's nuclear energy executive order for military us...

item.title: Trump's border czar says 'small' security force will remain in Minnesota after enforcement drawdown
item.description: White House border czar Tom Homan said Sunday that more than 1,000 immigration agents have left Minnesota's Twin Cities area and hundreds more will de...

item.title: No clear path to ending the partial government shutdown as lawmakers dig in over DHS oversight
item.description: Lawmakers and the White House offered no signs of compromise Sunday in their battle over oversight of federal immigration officers that has led to a p...

item.title: Massie says Trump wants him out for targeting the 'Epstein class'
item.description: Rep. Thomas Massie says President Trump wants him pushed out of Congress because he's trying to expose what he calls the "Epstein class."

item.title: Trump Throws In the Towel on Minneapolis Surge
item.description: Ultimately, the battle is about whether our immigration laws can be enforced.

item.title: Why Dale Earnhardtâs Legacy Still Matters
item.description: The life and death of the NASCAR champion show how legend can become as meaningful as accomplishment.

item.title: Schumer says Dems will fight voter ID push 'tooth and nail,' balks at DHS role in elections
item.description: Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., said that Senate Democrats will block the GOP-backed SAVE America Act requiring voter ID and proof of ci...

item.title: Iâm a Quiche Queen Now
item.description: On finally cracking the pie-crust code.

item.title: From Chuck To AOC, Here Are The Worst People Of The Week
item.description: From Chuck Schumerâs race-baiting false equivalencies to Lisa Murkowski being, well, Lisa Murkowski, it was a great week for bad people.

item.title: Here Are 10 Great Justice Scalia Quotes To Mark A Decade Since His Passing
item.description: Here are some of Justice Scalia's best moments in remembrance of the 10-year anniversary of his passing.

item.title: Virginia High Court Greenlights Democrat Effort To Give Millions Of Republicans A Single Seat In Congress
item.description: The Virginia Supreme Court handed Democrats a massive win Friday, allowing them to move forward with a redistricting referendum that would gerrymander...

item.title: Turns Out The Irishman Detained By ICE Was Facing Drug Charges Back Home
item.description: The arrest of Irishman Seamus Culleton fueled a false media narrative that ICE is grabbing law-abiding people who have done nothing wrong.
